releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Drop the inline sourcemap from production builds for reproducibility

An inline sourcemap base64-embeds the build machine's absolute file
paths into main.js, so a CI build and the Obsidian scorecard's
reproducer produce byte-different output and the "build verification"
check fails even from identical source.

Gate the sourcemap on build mode: production (pnpm build) now ships
`sourcemap: false`, while the dev/watch build keeps `sourcemap:
"inline"` for local debugging. Production main.js is now deterministic
given the locked dependency tree, so the reproducer matches. Bonus:
smaller shipped main.js, no leaked build paths.

Bump to 0.4.7.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-seo/compare/0.4.6...0.4.7

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Bump to 0.4.4 with scorecard improvements.

Hygiene and scaffolding:
- Add CONTRIBUTING.md
- Add release workflow with build provenance attestation
- Remove broken preinstall script reference

Dependency hygiene:
- Add pnpm.overrides for vulnerable transitive dev dependencies
  (minimatch, picomatch, brace-expansion, ajv, flatted, fast-uri,
  yaml)
- Update eslint-plugin-obsidianmd to 0.3.0 and typescript-eslint
  to 8.50.1+ to pull in patched transitives
- Update obsidian-dev-skills to 1.2.0

ESLint config:
- Scope obsidianmd recommended rules to TypeScript files only
- Configure obsidianmd/ui/sentence-case with project-specific
  acronyms (SEO, MDX, H1-H6, URL, CSV) and ignoreRegex for
  quoted button names

Code fixes:
- Remove all 32 eslint-disable-next-line obsidianmd/ui/sentence-case
  comments (the rule is not allowed to be disabled). Rewrite the
  underlying strings to satisfy sentence case directly, or rely on
  the new acronym/ignoreRegex config
- Replace createEl('div'/'span'/'a') with createDiv()/createSpan()/
  createEl('a', {...}) across UI components
- Use activeWindow/activeDocument for popout window compatibility
- Prefix unused parameters with underscore, drop unused catch
  bindings
- Mark fire-and-forget promises with void
- Fix Markdown capitalization in user-facing strings
- Rephrase A-to-Z sort labels to a-to-z to satisfy sentence case
- Fix Promise/queue contravariance and Timer type assignments
  that surfaced after the activeWindow conversions

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
### Fix all required linting issues from Obsidian bot review

Replace all 'any' types with 'unknown' for type safety
- duplicate-detection.ts: Record<string, unknown>
- error-handler.ts: T extends unknown[] and Record<string, unknown>
- performance.ts: T extends unknown[] in all generic functions

Remove unnecessary async keywords from functions without await
- commands/index.ts: callback function
- main.ts: ribbon icon callback

Fix promise handling with void operator (11 instances)
- seo-checker.ts: cacheResult call
- panel-actions.ts: openFile call
- panel-manager.ts: revealLeaf and leaf.open calls
- side-panel.ts: setViewState and saveSettings calls (5 instances)
- performance.ts: processIfNeeded calls (2 instances)

Fix promise return types in function arguments (2 instances)
- commands/index.ts: setTimeout callback wrapped with void async IIFE
- main.ts: setTimeout callback wrapped with void async IIFE

Remove unnecessary type assertions in panel-manager.ts
- Removed redundant 'as SEOSidePanel' casts after instanceof checks

Fix settings heading comment
- Changed "Directory settings" to "Directory configuration"

Fix TypeScript errors with proper type guards
- duplicate-detection.ts: Added type checks for frontmatter values
- panel-manager.ts: Fixed forceIconRefresh access pattern

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
### Code quality improvements and bug fixes
- Remove unnecessary async keywords from functions without await
- Replace any types with proper type definitions (App, TFile, PanelActions)
- Replace fetch API with Obsidian's requestUrl for network requests
- Fix promise handling in event listeners with void operator
- Convert UI text to sentence case and use Setting API for headings
- Replace deprecated app.workspace.activeLeaf usage
- Fix collapse/expand icon state preservation on refresh
- Fix initial collapse button state to match expanded items
- Remove plugin ID prefix from command IDs
- Fix regex escape characters and console.log statements

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fixed Issues from Plugin Review Feedback

### innerHTML/outerHTML Security Issues (2 instances)
src/ui/side-panel.ts:
    - Replaced `iconEl.innerHTML = ''` with DOM API: `while (iconEl.firstChild) { iconEl.removeChild(iconEl.firstChild); }`

src/ui/results-display.ts:
  - Replaced `suggestionEl.innerHTML = result.suggestion` with DOMParser:
     const parser = new DOMParser();
     const doc = parser.parseFromString(result.suggestion, 'text/html');
     // Move nodes safely using appendChild

### JavaScript Style Assignments → CSS Classes (17 instances)
src/ui/side-panel.ts:
   - Removed: headerEl.style.display = 'none/block'
   - Added CSS classes: .seo-header-hidden, .seo-header-visible
   - Removed: noResultsEl.style.* (6 properties)
   - Added CSS class: .seo-no-results-message

src/ui/progress-indicator.ts:
   - Removed: container.style.display = 'block/none'
   - Added CSS classes: .seo-progress-container-visible, .seo-progress-container-hidden
   - Changed: progressBar.style.width = 'X%'
   - To: progressBar.style.setProperty('--seo-progress-width', 'X%')
   - Added CSS: .seo-progress-bar { width: var(--seo-progress-width, 0%); }

src/settings-tab.ts:
   - Removed: warningEl.style.color/fontWeight/marginTop (2 instances)
   - Added CSS class: .seo-warning-message

### TypeScript `any` Type Improvements (8 instances)
src/settings.ts:
   - Changed: cachedGlobalResults: any[] → SEOResults[]
   - Added import: import { SEOResults } from "./types"

src/ui/side-panel.ts:
   - Changed: activeLeafChangeTimeout: any → ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null

src/ui/panel-actions.ts:
   - Changed: plugin: any → plugin: SEOPlugin
   - Changed: settings?: any → settings?: SEOSettings (3 methods)
   - Added imports: SEOPlugin, SEOSettings

src/ui/results-display.ts:
   - Changed: settings?: any → settings?: SEOSettings (2 methods)
   - Added import: SEOSettings
   - Added eslint-disable comments for legitimate Obsidian internal API `any` types

### Regex Lookbehinds (iOS Compatibility)
Verified: No regex lookbehinds found in codebase (already fixed)

files Modified:
- src/ui/side-panel.ts
- src/ui/results-display.ts
- src/ui/progress-indicator.ts
- src/settings-tab.ts
- src/settings.ts
- src/ui/panel-actions.ts
- styles.css

### Result
- All required issues fixed
- No linter errors
- Improved type safety
- Better security (no innerHTML)
- Theme-friendly styling (CSS classes instead of inline styles)

Also fixed some internal link detection issues.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix cache invalidation and improve UI/UX

- Make "Check current note" and "Refresh" buttons clear cache before running checks

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
# SEO Plugin for Obsidian 

A comprehensive SEO analysis tool for Obsidian that helps you optimize your notes for better discoverability and search engine ranking.

## Features

### **SEO Auditing**
- **Current Note Check** - Analyze the currently open note
- **Vault-wide Scan** - Check all notes in specified directories

### **Comprehensive SEO Checks**

#### **Content Quality**
- **Content Length** - Ensures minimum word count (default: 300 words)
- **Reading Level** - Analyzes readability and complexity
- **Keyword Density** - Optimal keyword usage (1-2% range)
- **Duplicate Content** - Detects similar content across notes

#### **Technical SEO**
- **Title Optimization** - Proper title length and structure
- **Meta Description** - Frontmatter description validation
- **Heading Structure** - Proper H1-H6 hierarchy
- **Image Alt Text** - Missing alt text detection
- **Image Naming** - SEO-friendly image filename patterns

#### **Link Management**
- **Broken Links** - Detects non-existent internal links
- **Naked Links** - Identifies unformatted URLs
- **Link Validation** - Checks link accessibility

### **User Experience**
- **Ribbon Icon** - Quick access to vault-wide analysis
- **Side Panels** - Dedicated current note and global analysis views
- **Flexible Sorting** - Sort by issues, warnings, or filename
- **One-click Navigation** - Jump directly to problematic files

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Open current note check** | Audit the currently open note |
| **Open vault check** | Audit all notes in configured directories |

## SEO Score System

The plugin uses a weighted scoring system that prioritizes critical SEO factors:

- **Critical Issues** (10x weight): Broken links, missing titles
- **Important Issues** (5x weight): Missing alt text, meta descriptions  
- **Moderate Issues** (3x weight): Content length, readability
- **Minor Issues** (1x weight): Warnings and suggestions

**Score Range**: 40-100 (40 = needs work, 100 = excellent)

## Usage Examples

### **Quick Current Note Check**
1. Open any markdown file
2. Use command "Open current note check" or click ribbon icon
3. Click "Check current note" button
4. Review issues and warnings

### **Vault-wide Analysis**
1. Configure scan directories in settings
2. Use command "Open vault check"
3. Click "Check all notes" for comprehensive analysis
4. Sort results by issues, warnings, or filename
5. Click any file to open and fix issues

### **Performance Optimization**
- First scan builds cache (slower)
- Subsequent scans use cache (much faster)
- Cache automatically expires after 24 hours
- Use "Clear SEO cache" for fresh analysis
